description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should have three jobs: build-linux, build-windows, and build-mac, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest respectively). For each job, check out the repository, cache Qt, install Qt 5.15.2 with specific modules and dependencies, and then run qmake and a build command (make or jom) depending on the environment.
